# Teslamattress.com — Tesla Camping Mattress Reviews

Independent Tesla camping mattress reviews and discount codes since 2017. We test every mattress for at least 6 nights in real camping conditions across Norway and Sweden.

## Author

Fredrik Mastouri — Founder & Lead Reviewer
- Real testing logs across multiple seasons
- 47+ nights of Tesla camping documented
- Methodology: https://teslamattress.com/methodology

## About this site

Editorial methodology: every mattress tested for at least 6 nights in real conditions. Independent purchasing — we buy mattresses ourselves. Affiliate disclosure: we earn commission from qualifying purchases at no cost to readers. Full disclosure: https://teslamattress.com/disclosure
